programme.desc: (1957) Second World War drama. Deborah Kerr plays a nun stranded on a Japanese-held Pacific island, with an untalkative marine (Robert Mitchum) as her only companion and hope of salvation. [S]

programme.title: Gemini Man
programme.desc: (2019) Will Smith stars in Ang Lee's action-thriller as both an over-the-hill hitman and the young clone of himself sent to take him out. With Clive Owen. [AD,S]

programme.title: How to Have Sex
programme.desc: (2023) Incisive coming-of-age drama with Mia McKenna-Bruce. Three teenage girls go on holiday looking for a taste of hedonism. But is the reality as simple or as fun as the dream? [S]

programme.title: The Lobster
programme.desc: (2015) Dark comedy starring Colin Farrell, Rachel Weisz and Léa Seydoux. In a dystopian future, single people are given 45 days to find a partner - and are turned into animals if they don't.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: This Gun for Hire
programme.desc: (1942) Classic noir starring Alan Ladd and Veronica Lake. As a cold-blooded assassin seek vengeance for a double cross, he unwisely falls for the girlfriend of the cop who's pursuing him.

programme.title: The Spoilers
programme.desc: (1955) Western. Anne Baxter, Jeff Chandler and Rory Calhoun star in a tale of fortune-seeking and treachery on the untamed Alaskan frontier.

programme.title: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: (1943) Hitchcock thriller starring Joseph Cotten as a serial killer fleeing the law. Teresa Wright is his adoring niece who, initially, refuses to believe her uncle is a murderer.

programme.title: Drums Along the Mohawk
programme.desc: (1939) John Ford western with Henry Fonda and Claudette Colbert. In 1776, a settler and his wife attempt to farm in the Mohawk Valley but face attacks from Native Americans and the English.

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: (2004) Tense sci-fi thriller starring Dennis Quaid and Jake Gyllenhaal. Can a scientist save his son from a sudden climatic catastrophe?

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: (2014) World War II action with Brad Pitt. A tank commander leads his crew into the dark, bloody heart of Hitler's last stand. But there's a rookie on board the Fury. With Michael Peña. [AD,S]

programme.title: Glory
programme.desc: (1989) Matthew Broderick, Denzel Washington and Morgan Freeman star in Edward Zwick's epic, Oscar-winning tribute to the first Black regiment raised in the North during the Civil War.

programme.title: Flight 555
programme.desc: Putu terpaksa kabur dari Bali ke Jakarta karena tidak setuju dijodohkan. Tapi, dia harus pulang ke Bali karena ayahnya sakit keras. Ia menggunakan Flight Komo 555 dengan penumpang yang bermacam-macam dan penuh drama.

programme.title: Banteng Mataram
programme.desc: Ki Ageng Mangir, cucu dari trah Raja Brawijaya, berusaha menegakkan kembali kejayaan Majapahit dengan modal kesaktian tombak pusaka Baru Klinting. Keinginan itu tercium oleh prajurit sandi Mataram, melalui Tumenggung Joropati.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Dua mentalis, Deddy Corbuzier dan Ronggo Sewu , bersaing untuk menunjukan siapa yang paling hebat. Ronggo Sewu yang dulunya asisten Deddy Corbuzier memfitnah Deddy Corbuzier menggunakan ilmu sihir dalam setiap atraksi sulapnya.

programme.title: Kekasih Gelap
programme.desc: Johan (Guss Marinda), tak senang dengan ibu tirinya dan menyendiri di sebuah pondok di tepi pantai. Drama kisah cinta rumitpun dimulai antara Johan (Guss Marinda), Indah (Flora Ricardo) dan Hesti (Debby Carol).

programme.title: I Know What You Did On Facebook
programme.desc: Luna gelisah, bimbang, karena harus menikah atas permintaan ibunya. Sang kekasih, Reno, makin memperlihatkan perbedaan sikap yang sangat mengganggu Luna. Dalam kebimbangannya, Luna bertemu Via, teman SMP yang punya problem sama.

programme.title: Winter In Tokyo
programme.desc: Ishida Keiko (Pamela Bowie), petugas perpustakaan, yang tinggal di sebuah apartemen kecil di pinggiran Tokyo, kedatangan tetangga baru, Nishimura Kazuto (Dion Wiyoko). Dia kembali ke Tokyo setelah 10 tahun tinggal di Amerika.

programme.title: Juara
programme.desc: Kisah “from zero to hero” seorang remaja bernama Bisma yang memiliki bakat ilmu beladiri. Bakat luar biasanya tidak pernah ia sadari karena ibunya, Sarah, selalu berusaha menjauhkan buah hatinya dari beladiri.

programme.title: Cinta Setaman
programme.desc: Film ini mengisahkan delapan cerita yang tak berhubungan satu dengan yang lain, tapi diniati oleh pembuatnya terbingkai dalam satu tema: cinta, seperti juga yang terlihat dalam judul yang mengawali setiap cerita.

programme.title: Noah Awal Semula
programme.desc: Peterpan adalah sebuah nama grup musik yang harus direlakan saat kedua anggotanya Andika dan Indra tidak lagi memiliki visi yang sama dengan anggota lain: Ariel, Lukman, Uki dan Reza.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Biasa
programme.desc: Tommy, penyanyi group band rock papan atas, suatu hari berhadapan dengan seorang gadis berusia 15 tahun yang mengaku sebagai anaknya berdiri di depan pintu apartemennya. Lintang, mantan pacarnya pun membenarkan.

programme.title: Cakar Harimau
programme.desc: Kematian suami, kehilangan anaknya dan keengganan kakaknya untuk menuntut balas, membuat Sundari (Wieke Widowati) terlunta-lunta dan tanpa sadar jatuh ke sebuah gua yang ternyata dikuasai oleh pendekar iblis yang memanfaatkannya.

programme.title: Pendekar Mata Satu
programme.desc: Datuk Alang-alang berhasil merebut pusaka sakti Sabuk Badak dari kakak seperguruannya. Anak kakak seperguruan tadi, dilempar bambu tepat di mata kirinya. Maka lengkaplah dua pusaka warisan gurunya menjadi miliknya.

programme.title: Bawalah Aku Pergi
programme.desc: Abdul Rauf adalah seorang pengarang novel. Dalam perjalanan mencari inspirasi di daerah Vietkong, Vietnam yang dilanda perang saudara, Rauf kehilangan kawannya akibat pertempuran. Rauf merasa martabat manusia hancur akibat perang.

programme.title: Bawalah Aku Pergi
programme.desc: Abdul Rauf adalah seorang pengarang novel. Dalam perjalanan mencari inspirasi di daerah Vietkong, Vietnam yang dilanda perang saudara, Rauf kehilangan kawannya akibat pertempuran. Rauf merasa martabat manusia hancur akibat perang.

programme.title: Code Name: Geronimo
programme.desc: Tim Navy SEAL menemukan identitas target mereka, Osama Bin Laden

programme.title: Don'T Suck
programme.desc: Kesempatan terakhir seorang komedian veteran untuk meraih ketenaran membawanya dalam perjalanan bersama komedian muda yang perlahan mengungkap masa lalu tak terduga.

programme.title: Detention (2012)
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh tiruan bernama Cinderhella meneror siswa SMA Grizzly Lake, memaksa sekelompok siswa yang sedang menjalani hukuman penahanan untuk bersatu demi bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Darkness Of Man
programme.desc: Seorang mantan agen Interpol melindungi anak dari rekan yang terbunuh saat menghadapi kekuatan kriminal di dunia bawah Los Angeles

programme.title: Riot
programme.desc: Seorang petugas polisi sengaja masuk penjara untuk membalas dendam terhadap seorang kriminal kejam, tetapi ia segera menyadari bahwa bertahan hidup di dalam jauh lebih sulit dari yang dibayangkannya.

programme.title: Old Henry
programme.desc: Seorang petani sederhana dipaksa melindungi seorang pria misterius dan uangnya, hingga masa lalu kelamnya sebagai penembak ulung perlahan terungkap.

programme.title: The Price We Pay
programme.desc: Setelah perampokan toko gadai yang gagal, dua penjahat mencari perlindungan di sebuah rumah pertanian terpencil, hanya untuk menemukan sesuatu yang jauh lebih mengerikan

programme.title: Timeline
programme.desc: ekelompok peneliti melakukan perjalanan waktu ke abad pertengahan untuk menyelamatkan seorang profesor, tetapi mereka terjebak dalam pertempuran mematikan.

programme.title: The Last Champion
programme.desc: Setelah kematian ibunya, mantan atlet Olimpiade yang terlibat skandal kembali ke kampung halamannya yang belum memaafkannya

programme.title: Havenhurst
programme.desc: Seorang wanita muda tinggal di apartemen tua dimana Ia harus menghadapi iblis yang menakutkan

programme.title: Bad Country
programme.desc: Seorang detektif bekerja sama dengan seorang informan dari dunia kejahatan untuk menghancurkan sindikat narkoba besar di Louisiana, meskipun berisiko besar bagi hidupnya.

programme.title: Alone We Fight
programme.desc: Sekelompok tentara Amerika dikirim dalam misi berbahaya untuk menghentikan pasukan Jerman di Perang Dunia II demi menyelamatkan ribuan nyawa

programme.title: Gravy
programme.desc: Sekelompok kanibal menyerang sebuah restoran pada malam Halloween, menjadikan para staf sebagai mangsa mereka

programme.title: Condor's Nest
programme.desc: Satu dekade setelah perang dunia 2, seorang pilot Amerika Serikat menjelajahi Amerika Selatan untuk mencari penjahat perang

programme.title: Clean
programme.desc: Seorang pria dengan masa lalu kelam berusaha menebus dosanya dengan menjalani kehidupan sederhana, tetapi kekerasan kembali menghantuinya ketika ia harus melindungi seorang gadis dari geng berbahaya.

programme.title: The Haunting Of Sharon Tate
programme.desc: Ketika mengandung, aktris Sahron Tate dihantui oleh mimpi tentang kematiannya

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: Seorang guru SMA bertarung dalam pertandingan bela diri campuran untuk mengumpulkan dana agar kegiatan ekstra kurikuler di sekolahnya tidak ditutup

programme.title: Friends With Benefits
programme.desc: Dylan dan Jamie mengira menambahkan sex kedalam persahabatan mereka merupakan hal yang mudah, ternyata hal tersebut malah membuat hubungan mereka manjadi rumit

programme.title: The Intruder (2019)
programme.desc: Sepasang pengantin baru membeli rumah, akan tetapi pemilik rumah menolak menyerahkan rumah tersebut

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome To The Jungle
programme.desc: Empat remaja tersedot ke dalam video game ajaib, dan satu-satunya cara untuk keluar adalah dengan meyelesaikan permainannya.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out Of The Shadows
programme.desc: Para kura-kura bertarung kembali dengan musuh mereka, Shredder, yang mempunyai sekutu baru: makhluk mutan Bebop dan Rocksteady dan alien Krang

programme.title: Superbad
programme.desc: Dua orang siswa sma yang bersahabat harus menghadapi perpisahan sma dengan kesedihan setelah rencana mereka untuk mengadakan pesta menjadi berantakan

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: Pasangan suami istri Pete dan Ellie memutuskan untuk mengadopsi tiga anak bersaudara yang penuh semangat, mengubah hidup mereka secara drastis dan menghadapi tantangan serta kebahagiaan dalam membentuk keluarga baru.

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm
programme.desc: Dua penipu yang mengaku sebagai pembasmi roh jahat harus menghadapi ancaman supernatural yang nyata saat mereka mencoba menyelamatkan desa dari kutukan misterius.

programme.title: Ghost Rider (2007)
programme.desc: Ketika Johnny Blaze melakukan perjanjian dengan iblis untuk menyelamatkan ayahnya, dia berubah menjadi "Ghost Rider", pemburu para pendosa.

programme.title: Last Vegas
programme.desc: Empat sahabat mengambil cuti dari rutinitas mereka sehari-hari demi menghadiri pesta bujang salah satu teman mereka yang masih belum menikah.

programme.title: The Bronze
programme.desc: Seorang mantan atlet senam peraih medali perunggu yang terkenal karena sikap kasarnya, dengan enggan membina seorang calon atlet Olimpiade yang tengah naik daun.

programme.title: The Possession Of Hannah Grace
programme.desc: Seorang polisi jaga malam di kamar mayat menghadapi teror dari roh jahat dalam mayat.

programme.desc: Saat remaja, Donny memiliki seorang putra bernama Todd dan membesarkannya seorang diri hingga Todd berusia 18 tahun. Kini, setelah bertahun-tahun berpisah, Donny kembali muncul menjelang pernikahan Todd, itu mengguncang hati Todd

programme.title: The One (2001)

programme.desc: Saat badai salju mengurung dua anak bersama calon ibu tiri mereka di sebuah pondok terpencil, rahasia gelap mulai terungkap dan menciptakan ketegangan mematikan.

programme.title: The Road Ahead
programme.desc: Fredrik Erixon, seorang petualang yang bersemangat, melintasi Swedia dengan ski roller dari utara di Karesuando di Lappland, hingga Smygehuk di Skane di selatan-sebuah perjalanan solo sekitar 2000 km selama tiga puluh hari

programme.title: Santos Tour Down Under Men 2026
programme.desc: Balapan sepeda terbesar Australia kembali untuk meluncurkan musim balap sepeda internasional. Australia Selatan dirayakan dalam kondisi terbaiknya, membawa peloton melintasi 6 etape.

programme.title: Santos Tour Down Under Women 2026
programme.desc: Edisi ke-9 Tour Down Under Wanita, yang merupakan bagian dari UCI Women's World Tour 2026.

programme.title: Absa Cape Epic 2026
programme.desc: Balapan sepeda gunung etape terkemuka di dunia. Rutenya berubah setiap tahun, membawa para pesepeda gunung amatir dan profesional dari seluruh dunia melewati 692 kilometer pemandangan alam yang belum terjamah.

programme.title: Mediterranean Epic 2026
programme.desc: Mediterranean Epic menawarkan balapan 4 etape UCI di mana para pesepeda gunung menikmati bersepeda gunung sepenuhnya selama rute di sekitar Oropesa del Mar, di provinsi Castellón di Spanyol.

programme.title: The First Second - Jerome Clementz
programme.desc: Melihat mata Jérôme Clementz tertuju pada lintasan, Sepanjang karier kompetitifnya selama 20 tahun, ia selalu kalah dari para pesaingnya, lalu bagaimana ia akan melampaui batas kemampuannya?

programme.title: Cycling For Autism
programme.desc: Perjalanan bersepeda inspiratif untuk meningkatkan kesadaran dan dukungan bagi komunitas autisme serta mempromosikan inklusi sosial melalui olahraga.

programme.title: Tour de la Provence 2026
programme.desc: Balapan ini menguji kemampuan para pembalap yang memiliki daya tahan tinggi, pendaki, dan sprinter, serta menarik peserta tingkat tinggi setiap tahunnya.

programme.title: Mediterranean Epic 2026
programme.desc: Mediterranean Epic menawarkan balapan 4 etape UCI di mana para pesepeda gunung menikmati bersepeda gunung sepenuhnya selama rute di sekitar Oropesa del Mar, di provinsi Castellón di Spanyol.

programme.title: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup Taiba - Brazil 2025
programme.desc: Brasil menjadi tuan rumah pemberhentian terakhir GKA Kite World Tour 2025. Para peselancar terbaik dunia akan beraksi di ombak Atlantik Ta'aba yang dahsyat selama empat hari kompetisi penuh aksi

programme.title: GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup Taiba - Brazil 2025

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup Abu Dhabi 2025

programme.title: The First Second - Armel Le Cl ac h E
programme.desc: Armel Le Cléac'h menciptakan kemenangannya berkat hubungan yang kuat dengan seluruh tim yang merupakan perpanjangan dari dirinya.

programme.title: The First Second - Samantha Davies
programme.desc: Samantha Davies melihat lautan sebagai kesenangan, yang jelas. Dalam simbiosis dengan perahunya, dia memimpin perjuangan sengit melawan kondisi yang keras dan menyukainya dengan cara yang hampir tak terjelaskan

programme.title: 2025 ROLEX New York Yacht Club Invitational Cup
programme.desc: Dua puluh tim dari 12 negara akan berkompetisi dalam Rolex New York Yacht Club Invitational Cup kesembilan, regatta dua tahunan yang diselenggarakan oleh New York Yacht Club Harbour Court di Newport, Rhode Island.

programme.title: SFT Wake Foil E-Foil World Cup Abu Dhabi 2025
programme.desc: Abu Dhabi, ibu kota Uni Emirat Arab, akan membuat sejarah musim gugur ini karena menjadi tuan rumah GWA Wingfoil World Cup untuk pertama kalinya, menandai grand final musim FreeFly-Slalom 2025.

programme.title: Nastro Rosa Tour 2025
programme.desc: Tur Marina Militare Nastro Rosa kembali pada tahun 2025 untuk edisi kelimanya, menawarkan perjalanan unik yang memadukan kompetisi tingkat tinggi dengan budaya maritim dan keindahan pantai Italia.

programme.title: One Water Race 2025 - The Film
programme.desc: One Water Race adalah perlombaan ketahanan yang berbasis pada Lari, Renang, dan Orientasi. 10 tim campuran yang terdiri dari 4 atlet harus menyeberangi kepulauan Stockholm-Swedia dari Utara ke Selatan

programme.title: Hugo Max - The Grand Slam

programme.title: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup Cape Verde 2026

programme.title: GKA Freestyle World Cup Abu Dhabi 2025

programme.title: GKA Hydrofoil Big Air World Cup Abu Dhabi 2025

programme.title: Best Via Ferrata In The Dolomites Climbing Possnecker
programme.desc: Cris dan Viv mendaki Piz Selva, gunung setinggi 2.941m yang termasuk dalam kelompok Sella, raksasa ikonik Dolomites. Mereka memulai pendakian mereka dari Passo Sella, dan rute yang mereka pilih adalah via Ferrata Possnecker

programme.title: Expedition Antarctica of extreme sports woman Caro North
programme.desc: Panjat es, ski gunung, dan berlayar di perairan terbuka selama berhari-hari melalui Selat Drake yang terkenal: Wanita olahraga ekstrem berusia 28 tahun, Caro North, melakukan perjalanan ke ujung selatan benua

programme.desc: Cris dan Viv memutuskan untuk mendaki Sgurr Alasdair, gunung tertinggi di pulau Skye. Tantangan utama yang mereka hadapi dalam mendaki puncak adalah Great Stone Chute.

programme.title: World Rookie Snowboard Finals 2026
programme.desc: Setelah musim dingin yang penuh dengan pemberhentian World Rookie Tour di seluruh Eropa, Asia, dan Amerika Utara, hanya atlet muda yang paling termotivasi dan berbakat yang berhak untuk berkompetisi di Final.

programme.title: The First Second - Sam Anthamatten
programme.desc: Sebagai spesialis di pegunungan tinggi, Sam adalah seorang freerider sejati, tetapi di balik instingnya untuk bermain ski, ada seorang pemandu: itu adalah pekerjaannya, budayanya.

programme.title: Alone And Without A Guide On Mexico s Third Highest Mountain-Iztaccihuatl
programme.desc: Punggungan menuju puncak Iztaccihuatl terasa tak berujung, tetapi pemandangan lembah di sekitarnya dan Popocatepetl membuat usaha itu sepadan.

programme.desc: Margalef adalah sebuah desa kecil di sebelah sungai Monsant, di Catalunya. Bebatuan paling menakjubkan di Eropa dan ratusan jalur untuk panjat tebing. Keseruan dan panjat tebing murni dalam film pendek yang menghibur ini.

programme.desc: Acara ini menampilkan atlet freeski muda paling berbakat di dunia saat mereka berkompetisi di salah satu snowpark paling terkenal di Eropa. Kesempatan eksklusif ini membawa kegembiraan dan semangat kompetitif.

programme.desc: Kompetisi ketahanan ekstrem yang mengutamakan kerja sama tim di medan pegunungan yang sangat terjal. Acara ini berlangsung di wilayah Arêches-Beaufort, Savoie, Prancis.

programme.title: Ungrounded Eps. 3 - Meredith Edwards
programme.desc: Mengungkapkan bagaimana tahun 2019 dia berjuang melawan pergumulan batin dengan tubuhnya yang hampir mengakibatkan transfusi darah penuh dan bangkit kembali untuk memenangkan salah satu Ultra Marathon paling menantang di dunia

programme.title: Zurich Barcelona Marathon 2026
programme.desc: Selamat datang di edisi ke-47 Zurich Barcelona Marathon, edisi 2026 ini mengumpulkan tidak kurang dari 32.000 peserta dengan jajaran yang terdiri dari 60 pengunjung internasional dari 100 negara berbeda.

programme.title: Ungrounded Eps. 3 - Meredith Edwards
programme.desc: Mengungkapkan bagaimana tahun 2019 dia berjuang melawan pergumulan batin dengan tubuhnya yang hampir mengakibatkan transfusi darah penuh dan bangkit kembali untuk memenangkan salah satu Ultra Marathon paling menantang di dunia

programme.title: Norcha
programme.desc: Norcha lebih dari sekadar perlombaan – ini adalah perjalanan ke jantung ketahanan manusia. Berlatar belakang pemandangan menakjubkan di Portugal utara, Norcha mengikuti tim-tim petualang saat mereka meninggalkan zona nyaman

programme.title: Florence Marathon - We run in art
programme.desc: Dua pelari terpilih memberikan komentar tentang partisipasi mereka dalam maraton Florence dan para penyelenggara memberikan wawasan unik tentang maraton Florence.

programme.title: HOKA Chiang Mai Thailand by UTMB
programme.desc: HOKA Chiang Mai Thailand by UTMB adalah final dari empat kejuaraan utama UTMB World Series pada tahun 2025, menawarkan kesempatan besar bagi para atlet untuk maju menuju Final UTMB World Series.

programme.title: Ultra Gobi 2025
programme.desc: Setiap tahun, atlet dari seluruh dunia berkumpul di padang gurun Gobi yang terpencil ini untuk ujian yang tiada duanya. Tantangan tim 121 kilometer adalah tempat kerja sama dan strategi menjadi segalanya

programme.title: Trail Menorca Cami De Cavalls 2025
programme.desc: 185 kilometer menelusuri tepi sebuah pulau berusia ribuan tahun, dengan keindahan alam yang unik. Jalur yang mempesona tebing yang menjulang tinggi, dan pantai bak mimpi membentuk salah satu rute paling menantang di Mediterania.

programme.title: The High
programme.desc: Film dokumenter pembuatan lomba lari di ketinggian terpanjang di dunia. Perjalanan sekelompok pelari ekstrem yang secara individu memutuskan untuk mengambil bagian dalam eksperimen lari berbahaya yang gagal.

programme.title: The High
programme.desc: Film dokumenter pembuatan lomba lari di ketinggian terpanjang di dunia. Perjalanan sekelompok pelari ekstrem yang secara individu memutuskan untuk mengambil bagian dalam eksperimen lari berbahaya yang gagal.

programme.title: Darah Perawan Bulan Madu
programme.desc: Putra yang baru menikahi Amira berencana mengajak sang istri untuk berbulan madu di pulau pribadinya. Namun keanehan-keanehan mulai terjadi menghantui pasangan pengantin baru tersebut.

programme.title: Kabut Sutra Ungu
programme.desc: Miranti ditinggal mati suaminya yang mengalami kecelakaan sebagai pilot. Hidup menjanda ini yang membawa banyak masalah, mulai dari keusilan kawan lama, pemuda tanggung, maupun kenalan baru. Miranti tetap berusaha hidup mandiri

programme.title: Kuntilanak 2
programme.desc: Setelah peristiwa dalam film sebelumnya, Sam (Julie Estelle) sudah putus dengan Agung dan saat ini berada dalam dilema dalam memperjuangkan jati dirinya dari sisi gelapnya yang semakin kuat kendati adanya wangsit Kuntilanak.

programme.title: Bing Slamet Sibuk
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang Bing Slamet yang berhasil menaklukkan anak-anak keluarga Eddy Sud, orang yang mempekerjakannya, dengan kepandaiannya bernyanyi. Film ini juga sarat dengan lelucon dengan hadirnya grup Kwartet jaya.

programme.title: Selamanya
programme.desc: Aristha berjumpa dengan kekasih lamanya, Bara, di kantor polisi. Bara, yang merasa bersalah karena menjerumuskan Aristha ke dunia narkoba, berusaha keras menarik Aristha dari dunia itu

programme.title: Jin & Jun
programme.desc: Jun, remaja biasa yang hidupnya berubah setelah menemukan kendi berisi Jin, makhluk ajaib yang bisa mengabulkan permintaan. Namun, keajaiban itu justru memicu berbagai kekacauan lucu dan petualangan seru.

programme.title: Jamila Dan Sang Presiden
programme.desc: Seorang perempuan bernama Jamila tiba-tiba menjadi headline di semua pemberitaan nasional. Ia mengaku membunuh seorang pejabat tinggi dan menolak mengajukan grasi kepada Presiden.

programme.title: 2 Dari 3 Laki-Laki
programme.desc: Doddy, yang dituduh selingkuh oleh Atik istrinya. Semua penjelasan Doddy selalu tidak dipercaya istrinya karena istrinya melihat kelakuan teman-temannya. Apalagi setelah istrinya melihat Doddy berpose mesra dengan wanita.

programme.title: Antri Dong
programme.desc: Dendy, pemuda mata keranjang yang berhubungan dengan tiga wanita, Linda, Cindy dan Sally. Masalah datang saat mereka bertiga datang di hari ulang tahunnya.

programme.title: Berangkat

programme.title: The Family Next Door
programme.desc: Australian mystery drama. With her time in Pleasant Court running out, Isabelle returns to a strange clue - as Barb prepares for the Eureka council hearing, Isabelle has some questions for her. Despite the protests, the development is approved and Ange has a much-needed win - however, it's short-lived as Clive tells her that he still wants out of the deal. As Ange feels that her world is crumbling, Isabelle learns that Barb has gifted Essie and Ben the family home - she suggests they celebrate and she will babysit. Questioning Barb's motives for leaving Pleasant Court, Isabelle takes the opportunity to search their house - at the same time, Ange is snooping through hers determined to find the truth of her hidden agenda. As Ange discovers Isabelle's true identity, Isabelle makes a huge discovery...

programme.title: The Family Next Door
programme.desc: The final part of the Australian mystery drama. After a restless night, Isabelle is burdened with her discovery - now she has the truth, she must consider if she is prepared to destroy one family to heal another. Meanwhile, Pleasant Court prepares for a street party as an increasingly anxious Barb quietly tidies up her affairs, and Ange is also wrestling with the truth as she knows why Isabelle is at Pleasant Court - when she confronts her, Isabelle deflects by dropping a bombshell of her own. Fran retreats and reveals to Nigel how she's been feeling, but his reaction is unexpected - with the street party in ruins and each family affected by Isabelle's investigation, a broken Ange insists that everyone has lunch together. When they realise that Barb and Mia are missing, Isabelle is panicked - fearing history is repeating itself, she wrestles with the truth and eventually reveals what it was that brought her to Pleasant Court.

programme.desc: Graham Norton hosts The Neighbourhood, a brand-new high stakes, street-sized popularity contest. Set in the heart of The Peak District, six households from across the UK move into a 'picture-perfect' village to compete for a massive £250,000 prize. As the close wave goodbye to another household, the competition ramps up in the final stages of the game. Giving the neighbours a chance to bond, Graham puts on some communal activities, a life-drawing class and a game of rounders. At the removal, Graham's shocking twist throws the neighbours into chaos, breaking bonds and burning bridges. Can any friendships come out unscathed?

programme.title: How To Clean Up For Cash
programme.desc: Josie and the team are in Essex helping David, who wants rid of his girlfriend Amanda's bargain buys. David has a vintage candy floss business and Amanda runs a retro ice cream parlour, so they're a match made in sugar heaven - but Amanda is the Bear Grylls of the bargain hunt, and has filled their home office with all her finds. Underneath the mountain of clutter are desks, and as busy entrepreneurs David needs the office cleared pronto! Whether it's shoes, expensive handbags, collectable artwork or even Amanda's jewellery, David is adamant it all needs to be sold. Hidden in the clutter, David discovers his Dad's old reel to reel tape of The Beatles that he's never listened to - if it's an original unknown recording, Dan reveals they could be sitting on a life-changing amount of money! Completely unaware her items have been boxed up and valued, Amanda returns home to the shock of a lifetime. Will the newly-cleared office be enough to tempt her to take the cash?

Meanwhile, Reece's middle-class cousin Tyreece comes to stay with him and Jodie - he's been given a final warning by the police and his mum wants him to get away from the 'bad influence' mates she believes to be the problem, but he wastes no time in stealing some parcels from a delivery van to impress the boys. When Christopher's mum's ring goes missing, Christopher believes Reece took it as he's the only person who knew where he kept it - their burgeoning relationship is rocked as their class assumptions about each other are back to the fore, but Reece is forced to make a tough decision when he discovers who actually did steal the ring.

When she tells him that his name is Disneyland Darren, Christopher has Reece's back every step of the way in the search for his dad - when they do eventually track him down, his identity is a huge shock and Reece is left to wonder if this is a relationship that he wants to pursue. Meanwhile, Aimee and Mia-Louise fall out as Aimee is worried that Ziad is scamming Mia-Louise for money - Mia-Louise bites back by telling her that she's embarrassing herself by being interested in Christopher as he isn't interested in 'girls like her'. Keen to prove the other wrong, the girls' feud intensifies...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby decides to join a trip from Midsomer Parva to Brighton because he is suspicious about a deal to buy coastal land for holiday chalets by Causton's mayor Dave Hicks - he discovers that the land wanted by Hicks is prone to flooding from the sea. Also against the proposal is Lady Matilda William, a descendant of a French knight Sir Richard Guillaume, whose son Richard will be the last of the line because of brain damage sustained in an attack 20 years ago - in Brighton, some of the villagers go to the funfair. When Dalgleish takes a ride on the ghost train, he emerges from the tunnel beheaded - Barnaby learns about a proposal to build flood defences which would make Hicks' land rocket in value and that Dalgleish lent Hicks money to bribe councillors to agree. Back in Midsomer, Barnaby realises there could be a connection between Dalgleish's greedy desire for land and Lady Matilda's desire to preserve the Guillaume family line... but who is prepared to kill to protect Richard?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates when the body of the co-owner of a chip shop is found in his own freezer - a seemingly successful entrepreneur and dedicated family man, Vera uncovers secrets, lies and some unforgivable behaviour as she tries to unwrap the case. Once the investigation begins, it soon becomes apparent that our enigmatic entrepreneur has left behind debts, broken promises, ruined lives and seriously interfered in family business that was not his own - now Vera must find who is responsible for the this unsavoury chip shop assault and battery.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Geordie is still mourning Will's departure when Mrs C charges into the pub with reports of a gentleman breaking into the vicarage - Geordie leaps into action and heads straight inside the vicarage to confront the intruder. A tussle ensues between them before Geordie is confronted by the realisation that this man is no burglar - he's the new vicar. The man introduces himself as the Reverend Alphy Kottaram - as Alphy settles into life in Grantchester, his first order of business at the church is a funeral service for local landowner Albert Baron, who apparently took his own life - when the service is abruptly interrupted by the Walkers, a family warring with the Barons, a fight breaks out in the church. As the Walkers leave, Albert's son Harvey accuses the Walkers of murdering his father - as Alphy corrals the two families into the vicarage and Geordie arrives to investigate, an initially reluctant Alphy finds himself drawn into solving clues and uncovering buried secrets.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Alphy receives a mysterious letter in the post - this is the second time he's received post of its kind, but the meaning behind both letters entirely escapes him. Alphy doesn't have long to dwell on this because he has been invited to Marwood Manor for dinner and a party - Alphy plans to use this opportunity to drum up funds for the ailing church, but when Lady Marwood announces that it's time to play hide and seek, Alphy finds himself opening a cupboard while looking for a suitable hiding spot and is surprised to discover a dead body inside. The body is that of Dennis, the Marwoods' gardener who had apparently left the manor only a day before without a word - a blackmail letter is found on him, but it's not immediately clear whether the letter is addressed to Dennis or if he'd written it for someone else. As Alphy and Geordie investigate the murky world of the manor, they begin to uncover strange secrets and illicit desires amongst the residents and staff there.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series following two detective constables in Manchester and written by BAFTA Award-winner Sally Wainwright. When DC Rachel Bailey is dumped, her best friend DC Janet Scott is there to pick up the pieces. Meanwhile, DCI Gill Murray takes Rachel, Janet and the team through their new murder case at work: a young Turkish woman has been killed in her home and her death made to look like suicide. Rachel throws herself into the investigation, soon discovering that the victim's husband was having an affair - she takes a risk when she questions the man's mistress, but has her high-stakes approach jeopardised the case, or will she get results? Rachel is also occupied with investigating her ex and is horrified to find that he is married with children - at the same time, Janet is contacted by the brother of a school friend who was abducted and murdered when they were still at primary school. He asks if she will reopen the case - and Janet agrees to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Police drama following the personal and professional lives of two Manchester detectives. Things become even more complicated for Rachel when she reveals to her ex Nick that she is pregnant - and his unsympathetic response confirms her decision to have a termination. At work, the team face a gruesome case in which a mother of two has been brutally raped and left to bleed to death in the boot of her car. The team get a lucky break when CCTV footage reveals a man following the woman just before she disappeared - the same man who had been seen asking for a taxi to the Walden Estate. The police go to the estate to make house-to-house enquiries, and a sharp piece of detective work from Rachel leads to the arrest of teenager Luke Farrell. However, Luke's arrest sparks a series of events which leads to further tragedy, much to the horror of the team. Meanwhile, Janet steps up her investigation into her childhood friend Veronica's death and meets with an officer who investigated the murder.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: As Grace's team recovers from recent distressing events, they are called to the scene of an awful car accident when a local hotelier is killed by an oncoming driver who cruelly flees the site of the crash and leaves him to die - as Roy tackles what may prove to be one of his most complex cases yet, DC Vee Wilde faces a challenge of her own when she comes face to face with her estranged father after many years. Meanwhile, Grace's life takes a devastating turn as his wedding to Cleo draws near...

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Now living away from home, Esme visits the Keatings one morning with her friend Mae to bring some washing round - Geordie is happy to see Esme and tries to put a positive spin on things, but Cathy is not best pleased. Later that morning, Geordie and Cathy are confronted by their worst fears when they hear of a young woman's death at Esme's office - it turns out to be Mae, who has died from anaphylaxis following an allergic reaction. Medical results reveal that Mae had an allergy to almonds - it had been Mae's birthday that day and Geordie speculates that it could've been her birthday cake that was the cause of the allergic reaction, but when the test results show up negative, a mystery emerges around how Mae ingested almonds. It becomes apparent that someone had done this purposefully with the intention of murdering Mae, but why would someone want to kill a young woman like this? Meanwhile, Alphy is eager to update the Bishop on the hard work he's been doing on the church.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Geordie and Larry are called out to Marcus Blakely's farm one morning following the discovery of a skeleton in his field - when the skeleton turns out to be that of a Roman soldier, a team of archaeologists arrive soon after to set up a dig site while causing quite a stir in the village. Mrs C hears the news and convinces Alphy and Jack to walk down and take a look - that night sees the lead archaeologist Henry host a talk at the village hall that showcases their findings and further plans for the dig. The next morning dawns with Henry being found dead - and eerily lying in the same spot in which the skeleton was discovered. As Alphy and Geordie investigate Henry and his fellow archaeologists further, they uncover a tangled web of betrayal and deceit, in which no-one is quite who they say they are. Meanwhile, Alphy is still processing the news that he's out of a job and looks for a sign from God about what he should do next - should he give up and leave, or stay and fight?

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Detective drama series. When a rape and murder case goes to trial, DCI Gill Murray is determined to see defendant Georgios Stelikos convicted, but the case is made more complicated because only one of the alleged victims is prepared to testify. When Rachel gives evidence, she is horrified to discover that her ex Nick is the defence barrister. Nick's cross-examination shakes her when he uses information which passed between them when they were together, but events take a shocking turn as the verdict is delivered.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Detective drama series. Rachel's professional life hangs in the balance when DCI Gill Murray finds out that her relationship with barrister Nick Savage could have put a case at risk. Janet's affair with a colleague is also uncovered, but has Rachel overstepped the mark by confronting Janet about it?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Tom Barnaby and DS Ben Jones investigate a land feud involving two farming dynasties which explodes into violence - trouble seems to be brewing in the pretty village of Ford Florey when a tract of waste ground dubbed the Swamp becomes the focus of a land dispute between two old agricultural families. Tensions are increased further after a band of travellers also lay claim to the site with a view to developing it into a place where they can settle - matters come to a head at the town's annual Fayre. While some villagers are taking part in a shootout reconstruction at a Wild West show, a woman is shot for real - she turns out to be the farm manager for one of the feuding families and the timing of her death raises questions. Barnaby and Jones launch a murder investigation and uncover a series of seething grudges within the village before another person is killed - does the Swamp hold the key to identifying the murderer?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The first of two compelling final chapters in the crime drama starring Brenda Blethyn as DCI Vera Stanhope bids farewell. Vera nets two cases when an ex-prisoner's body is discovered on the banks of the Tyne - has our former inmate been served cold justice, or does his death run deeper?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Geordie arrives at the vicarage to ask for Alphy's help with the case of a missing woman - when Alphy sees a picture of her, he is stunned to discover that it's a woman he met in a bar recently who introduced herself as Petra. It turns out that Petra's real name is Caroline Stansham - her father says that she's been missing for weeks and that means that Alphy could be one of the last people to have seen her. When Geordie and Alphy learn that Caroline had been writing for a student newspaper and track down the paper's office, it turns out to be a converted dorm room occupied by aspiring satirists Innes and Nigel. After hitting a dead end, the pair are shocked to learn that Innes has been brutally murdered in his room - how could this have happened, and does it have anything to do with Caroline's disappearance? Meanwhile, Leonard grows concerned over Sam's increasing inﬂuence over Daniel, and Geordie is shocked to find some mood-controlling pills that Cathy has been taking.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. It's Sunday morning and Alphy is preparing for the arrival of the new vicar David - when David then railroads Alphy's service and delivers a pompous and uninspiring sermon to the congregation, Alphy slips out and catches a woman with a pram posting a letter to the vicarage. Alphy opens the letter and sees that it is another Bible page with the words 'Why have you given up?' scrawled on it - meanwhile, Geordie and Larry are called out to investigate the death of a man called Fred Eccles on the streets of Cambridge. When the detectives speak to Fred's landlord Connie, they learn that he was a reclusive man who spent most of his time painting miniature soldiers and whose only real contact was with the people in his church group The Way Finders - as Alphy, Geordie and the rest of the team race against the clock to uncover the truth, they are confronted with a shocking and terrifying revelation that puts Daniel and the fellow Way Finders in grave danger.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: The detective drama series continues. When Rachel bumps into an ex-juror, she is shocked to discover that the woman had an affair with Nick in the middle of a trial. A desperately worried Nick does everything in his power to persuade Rachel to keep the knowledge to herself. Meanwhile, after a current investigation throws up similarities to Veronica's murder, Janet tells Geoff Hastings that they could be one step closer to bringing his sister's killer to justice. However, when Rachel stumbles across some new facts in the case, she realises that Janet is in terrible danger. Can she get the information to Janet in time?

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Police drama. As Rachel is walking home, she is narrowly missed by a car which then smashes into the side of the road. She then learns that the crash is linked to the disturbing information she found out about Nick's affair with a juror. Was Rachel targeted, and could Nick have had something to do with it? Meanwhile, the latest case for the team is that of a teenager shot dead at home. His best friend witnessed the shooting, but it takes all of Janet's skill to get him to open up because he is terrified that he could be next. As Rachel's career hangs in the balance when Gill discovers just how far she has gone in pursuit of love, Janet needs to end her own affair once and for all.

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies
programme.desc: The 18th entry in the James Bond film series. Media tycoon Elliot Carver is one of the most powerful men in the world - his newspaper Tomorrow is a world leader in that industry, and he is about to launch a satellite network to capitalise on his success. However, he is hungry for more business - especially from the Asian market - and when a British Royal Navy ship is mysteriously sunk in the South China Sea by unknown means and any survivors of the attack are killed afterwards, Tomorrow manages to be first to tell the world that the survivors' bodies were riddled with Chinese bullets. China repeatedly denies any responsibility for the attack, but Admiral Roebuck of the Royal Navy insists that China are to blame. However, M - the venerable boss of MI6 - suspects that there is more to the attack and therefore sends James Bond on a mission to find the real cause behind the sinking of the British ship. Can 007 do so and stop war breaking out between Britain and China?

programme.title: Laskar Pelangi 2
programme.desc: Ikal dan Arai menjalani hari-hari menimba ilmu di Sorbonne. Ikal mengambil master ekonomi sementara Arai berkutat dengan ilmu biologi. Di antara harapan ayah Ikal yang menghendaki mereka menjadi ahli pupuk dan apoteker.

programme.title: Kiko S3
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang keinginan Occi untuk bisa seperti Bulk Boggard yang kuat. Kiko pun berusaha membantu gurita kesayangannya tersebut agar bisa mewujudkan impiannya.

programme.title: Ricis The Adventure
programme.desc: Ricis bersama timnya menemukan ponsel misterius dan tersedot ke layar ponsel. Ternyata mereka diseret ke portal yang mengirim mereka ke Socidia City, kota metaverse tempat semua aktivitas jejaring sosial di dunia nyata.

programme.title: Dragons
programme.desc: Menceritakan seorang Putra seorang ketua Viking berteman dengan musuh mereka, seekor naga. Kisah ini berfokus pada kejadian terjadi di desa Berk Viking, di mana peternakan penduduk setempat kerap dicuri & diserang oleh seekor naga

programme.title: Little Charmers
programme.desc: Di tanah ajaib Charmville, Charmer-in-training Hazel dan sahabatnya, Posie dan Lavender, masih terbiasa dengan kekuatan mereka. Hazel yang tak kenal takut, memimpin kelompok dalam petualangan yang dirancang kemampuan magis mereka.

programme.title: Menggapai Mimpi

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Berlatar 1.300 tahun setelah How to Train Your Dragon, dimana naga telah lama dianggap sebagai legenda. Ceritanya berpusat pada sekelompok remaja yang menemukan celah di Bumi akibat komet yang membuka dunia bawah tanah penuh naga

programme.title: Waktunya Srimulat Bercyanda

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara

programme.title: Isyarat

programme.title: Bedu Dan Adul

programme.title: Madun
programme.desc: Serial Madun menceritakan perjalanan hidup madun 16 tahun dalam memperjuangkan cita-citanya menjadi pesepakbola.

programme.title: Digimon Adventure
programme.desc: Tujuh orang anak pergi ke perkemahan musim panas, Hal terakhir yang mereka harapkan adalah salju turun di bulan Juli. Dalam kebingungan itu, mereka masing-masing menerima perangkat aneh yang memindahkan mereka ke dunia lain.

programme.title: Little Angel
programme.desc: Bernyanyilah bersama bayi John dan keluarganya dengan lagu anak-anak klasik dan lagu-lagu baru yang menarik yang membantu anak-anak prasekolah mempelajari semua tentang dunia.

programme.title: Numberblocks

programme.desc: Program anak-anak yang menampilkan karakter-karakter yang membawa keceriaan dan edukasi. Program ini berfokus pada edukasi anak melalui lagu-lagu ceria dan cerita yang menarik.

programme.title: Tayo, The Little Bus

programme.desc: Pororo si penguin kecil dan teman -temannya tinggal di tanah yang damai yang ditutupi salju dan es. mereka semua memiliki kepribadian dan minat yang berbeda, yang terkadang menyebabkan sedikit masalah.

programme.title: Bing

programme.title: Tian Tian

programme.title: Katuri Meets Boonie
programme.desc: Katuri adalah sebuah acara menarik tentang empat anak burung pegar yang tumbuh di hutan alami di bawah perawatan dan kasih sayang lembut ibu Flora.

programme.title: Pokemon Season 27 Horizon S2

programme.desc: Keluarga Somat menceritakan bahwa kita hidup harus saling berdampingan dan membantu satu sama lain sebagai masyarakat maupun pelajar.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
टीनएज म्यूटेंट निंजा टर्टल्स: आउट ऑफ़ द शैडोज़
டீன்ஏஜ் ம்யூட்ன்ட் நிஞ்சா டர்டில்ஸ்: அவுட் ஆஃப் தி ஷாடோஸ்
టీనేజ్ మ్యూటెంట్ నింజా టర్టల్స్: ఔట్ ఆఫ్ ది షాడోస్
टीनेज म्युटंट निन्जा टर्टल: आऊट ऑफ द शॅडोज
programme.desc: The turtles team up with their new member, Casey Jones, to take down Shredder, who joins forces with mad scientist Baxter Stockman, Bebop, Rocksteady and Krang.
टर्टल्स अपने नए सदस्य, केसी जोन्स के साथ मिलकर श्रेडर को हराने के लिए एकजुट होते हैं, जो पागल वैज्ञानिक बैक्सटर स्टॉकमेन, बेबॉप, रॉकस्टेडी और क्रैंग के साथ हाथ मिला लेता है।
ஷ்ரெடரையும் பைத்தியக்கார விஞ்ஞானி பாக்ஸ்டர் ஸ்டாக்மேனையும் வீழ்த்த ஆமைகள் கேசி ஜோன்ஸுடன் இணைந்து செயல்படுகின்றன.
తాబేళ్లు, కేసీ జోన్స్‌ కలిసి స్టాక్‌మాన్, బెబోప్, రాక్‌స్టెడీ, క్రాంగ్‌లతో చేతులు కలిగిన ష్రెడర్‌ను ఎదుర్కొంటాయి.

programme.title: The Pilgrim
द पिलग्रीम
த பில்க்ரிம்
ది పిలిగ్రిమ్‌
programme.desc: A convict escapes from prison and guises as a pastor to save himself from the sheriff. The sheriff cannot be outsmarted and is determined to take him into custody.
एक अपराधी जेल से भाग जाता है और खुद को शेरिफ से बचाने के लिए पादरी का वेश धारण कर लेता है। शेरिफ उसे चकमा नहीं दे पाता और उसे हिरासत में लेने पर अड़ा रहता है।
தப்பியோடிய ஒரு கைதி ஒரு போதகராக வேடமிட்டு இருக்கும்போது, ஷெரிப் அவரது மறைவிடத்தை கண்டுபிடித்து அவரை பிடிக்க முயல்கிறார்.
జైలు నుండి తప్పించుకున్న దోషి, షెరీఫ్ నుండి తనని కాపాడుకోవడానికి పాస్టర్ వేషం వేస్తాడు. కానీ,షెరీఫ్‌ను ఎవరూ మోసంచేయలేరు.

programme.title: Incoming
इनकमिंग
இன்கம்மிங்
ఇన్కమింగ్
इन्कमिंग
programme.desc: Imprisoned at the International Space Station, a group of terrorists manages to escape confinement and take control of the ship. However, their mission to target the Soviets threatens world peace.
आतंकवादियों द्वारा एक अंतरिक्ष स्टेशन पर कब्ज़ा करने के बाद उनका अगला लक्ष्य मास्को शहर है। एक शटल पायलट और एक नया डॉक्टर उन्हें रोकते हैं, जबकि एक दुष्ट सीआईए एजेंट के योजनाओं से यह जटिल हो जाता है।
விண்வெளி நிலையம் மூலம் மாஸ்கோவை தாக்கும் தீவிரவாதிகளை பைலட்டும் மருத்துவரும் தடுக்க, சிக்கலாக்கும் சி‌ஐ‌ஏ முகவர்.
మాస్కోను లక్ష్యంగా చేసుకుని ఒక అంతరిక్ష కేంద్రాన్ని ఆక్రమించుకున్న ఉగ్రవాదులను ఒక షటిల్ పైలట్, ఒక వైద్యుడు అడ్డుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Sabotage
सैबटाज़
சாபடாஜ்
సాబోటేజ్
सॅबोटॅज
programme.desc: John Wharton, the captain of an elite task force, raids a safe house owned by one of the most lethal drug cartels with his team. Though the mission is successful, death awaits them.
जॉन व्हार्टन, एक विशिष्ट टास्क फोर्स के कप्तान, अपनी टीम के साथ ख़तरनाक ड्रग कार्टेल में से एक के स्वामित्व वाले एक घर पर छापा मारते हैं। हालांकि मिशन सफल होता है, लेकिन मौत उनका इंतज़ार कर रही है।
ஜான் வார்டன், தனது குழுவுடன் போதைப்பொருள் கும்பல்களில் ஒருவருக்குச் சொந்தமான ஒரு பாதுகாப்பான வீட்டைத் தாக்குகிறார்.
డ్రగ్ కార్టెల్ యాజమాన్యంలోని సురక్షితమైన ఇంటిపై దాడి చేసిన తర్వాత జాన్ వార్టన్, అతని బృందం ఇబ్బందులను ఎదుర్కొంటారు.

programme.title: No Escape
नो एस्केप
நோ எஸ்கேப்
నో ఎస్కేప్
नो एस्केप
programme.desc: Jack Dwyer and his family move to a country in Southeast Asia. However, a sudden and violent uprising forces them to flee or risk being executed.
जैक ड्वायर और उसका परिवार दक्षिण-पूर्व एशिया के एक देश में चले जाते हैं। हालाँकि, अचानक और हिंसक विद्रोह उन्हें भागने पर मजबूर कर देता है या फिर उन्हें मार दिए जाने का जोखिम उठाना पड़ता है।
குடும்பத்துடன் தென்கிழக்கு ஆசியாவிலுள்ள நாட்டுக்கு போகும் ஜேக், திடீர் வன்முறை எழுச்சி அவர்களை தப்பிஓட வைக்கிறது.
కమాండింగ్ ఆఫీసర్ చంపిన దోషిగా ఒక సైనికుడు తన స్నేహితుల ద్వారా జెట్టిసన్,అపరాధులని ఒక ద్వీపంలో ఉన్న జైలులో వదిలేస్తారు.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie
द लेगो मूवी
த லெகோ மூவி
ది లెగో మూవీ
programme.desc: Emmet, an ordinary individual prophesied to be the Special, is entrusted with the responsibility of saving the Lego world from the cruel ways of Lord Business.
एक साधारण व्यक्ति एम्मेट जिसके बारे में भविष्यवाणी की गई थी कि वह विशेष होगा, उसे लेगो वर्ल्ड को लॉर्ड बिज़नेस के क्रूर तरीकों से बचाने की जिम्मेदारी सौंपी जाती है।
லெகோ உலகத்தை லார்ட் பிசினஸின் கொடூரமான வழிகளில் இருந்து காப்பாற்ற வேண்டிய ஸ்பெஷல் என்று முன்னறிவிக்கப்பட்ட எம்மெட்.
ఒక సాధారణ వ్యక్తి ఎమ్మెట్ కు లార్డ్ బిజినెస్ క్రూరమైన మార్గాల నుండి లెగో ప్రపంచాన్ని రక్షించే బాధ్యతతో అప్పగిస్తారు.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
ब्लू बीटल
ப்ளூ பீட்டல்
బ్లూ బీటిల్
programme.desc: An ancient alien relic chooses a college graduate to be its symbiotic host. As a result, the young man finds himself in possession of a suit with incredible powers.
एक प्राचीन एलियन अवशेष एक कॉलेज ग्रेजुएट को अपना सहजीवी मेज़बान चुनता है। नतीजतन, उस युवक को अविश्वसनीय शक्तियों वाला एक सूट मिल जाता है।
ஒரு அன்னிய நினைவுச்சின்னம் அதன் கூட்டாளியாக தேர்வு செய்த ஒரு கல்லூரி பட்டதாரி அபூர்வ சக்திகளை கொண்ட உடையை பெறுகிறான்.
స్కారాబ్ వద్ద అతీత శక్తులు పొందిన జామీ రేయెస్, దుర్మార్గపు ఉద్దేశాలు కలిగిన వ్యాపారవేత విక్టోరియా కోర్డ్‌తో పోరాడతాడు.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
300: राइज़ ऑफ़ एन एम्पायर
300: ரைஸ் ஆஃப் அன் எம்பயர்
300 : రైజ్ ఆఫ్ యాన్ ఎంపైర్
300: राईज ऑफ अ‍ॅन एम्पायर
programme.desc: Xerxes, seeking revenge for his father's death, declares war on Greece. As a result, Themistocles, the Athenian admiral, is compelled to form an alliance with Sparta to protect Athens.
पिता की मौत का बदला लेने के लिए जेरेक्सेस के, ग्रीस पर युद्ध की घोषणा करते ही, एथेंस के एडमिरल थेमिस्टोकल्स, मजबूरन स्पार्टा के साथ गठबंधन बनाते हैं।
செர்க்ஸஸ் கிரீஸ் மீது போர் பிரகடனம் செய்ததன் விளைவாக ஏதென்ஸைப் பாதுகாக்க ஸ்பார்டாவுடன் கைகோர்க்கும் தெமிஸ்டோகிள்ஸ்.
తన సైన్యంతో గ్రీస్‌ను జయించటానికి ప్రయత్నించినప్పుడు, థెమిస్టోకిల్స్ మరియు అతని సైన్యం వారిని వ్యతిరేకించాలి.

programme.title: The Lost City
द लॉस्ट सिटी
தி லாஸ்ட் சிட்டி
ది లాస్ట్ సిటీ
द लॉस्ट सिटी
programme.desc: Loretta Sage, a novelist, faces real-life peril when abducted by a billionaire.
जहां लोरेटा सेज के उपन्यास प्राचीन मकबरों और साहसिक कारनामों से भरे होते हैं। वहीं एक सनकी अरबपति के एक पौराणिक खोए हुए शहर का पता लगाने के लिए उनका अपहरण कर लिया जाता है।
ஒரு புகழ்பெற்ற தொலைந்து போன நகரத்தைக் கண்டுபிடிக்க சாகச நாவலாசிரியர் லோரெட்டா சேஜ் ஒரு கோடீஸ்வரரால் கடத்தப்படுகிறார்.
లోరెట్టా సేజ్ నవలలు పురాతన సమాధులు,సాహసోపేతమైన సాహసాలతో నిండి ఉన్నాయి,కానీ ఆమె నిజ జీవితంలో వాటికి సిద్ధంగా ఉందని కాదు.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
रैम्बो: फर्स्ट ब्लड पार्ट 2
ராம்போ: ஃபர்ஸ்ட் ப்ளட் பார்ட் II
రాంబో: ఫస్ట్ బ్లడ్ పార్ట్ 2
programme.desc: John Rambo is offered the chance to cut short his prison tenure by going on a secret mission for the US government deep into the jungles of Vietnam and locating American POWs.
जॉन रेम्बो को अमेरिकी सरकार के लिए वियतनाम के जंगलों में गुप्त मिशन पर जाकर अमेरिकी युद्धबंदियों का पता लगाने के लिए अपनी जेल की अवधि कम करने का मौका दिया जाता है।
வியட்நாமின் காடுகளுக்குள் சென்று அமெரிக்க போர்க் கைதிகளைக் கண்டறிந்து தனது சிறை காலத்தை குறைக்கும் வாய்ப்பை பெறும் ஜான்.
వియత్నాం అడవుల్లో రహస్య మిషన్‌కి వెళ్లి అమెరికన్ యుద్ధ ఖైదీలను గుర్తించడంతో రాంబో తన జైలు శిక్షను తగ్గించుకోగలుగుతాడు.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
जॉनी इंग्लिश स्ट्राइक्स अगेन
ஜானி இங்க்லீஷ் ஸ்ட்ரைக்ஸ் அகேன்
జానీ ఇంగ్లీష్ స్ట్రైక్స్ ఎగైన్
programme.desc: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.
जब एक हैकर ब्रिटेन के अंडरकवर एजेंटों की पहचान उजागर कर देता है, तो ब्रिटिश एजेंट जॉनी इंग्लिश फिर से एक्शन में आ जाता है और उसे आधुनिक तकनीक की चुनौतियों का सामना करना पड़ता है।
பிரிட்டனிலுள்ள இரகசிய முகவர்களின் அடையாளங்களை வெளிப்படுத்தும் ஹேக்கர் கண்டறிய முயலும் ஜானி, பல சவால்களை கடக்க வேண்டும்.
ప్రభుత్వ సమాచారాన్ని సంగ్రహించి, బ్రిటన్ రహస్య ఏజెంట్ల వివరాలను బయటపెట్టిన హ్యాకర్ ను పట్టుకోవడానికి జానీని నియమిస్తారు.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
जी.आई. जो: द राइज़ ऑफ कोबरा
ஜி.ஐ. ஜோ: தி ரைஸ் ஆஃப் கோப்ரா
జి.ఐ. జో: ది రైజ్ ఆఫ్ కోబ్రా
जी.आय. जो: द राईज ऑफ कोब्रा
programme.desc: American soldiers Duke and Ripcord survive an attack by arms dealer James McCullen and soon join an elite military team tasked with taking him down for good.
अमेरिकी सैनिक ड्यूक और रिपकॉर्ड हथियार डीलर जेम्स मैककुलन के हमले से बच जाते हैं और जल्द ही उसे हमेशा के लिए खत्म करने के लिए एक विशिष्ट सैन्य दल में शामिल हो जाते हैं।
அமெரிக்க வீரர்கள் டியூக்-ரிப்கார்ட் ஆயுத வியாபாரி ஜேம்ஸ் மெக்கல்லனின் தாக்குதலிலிருந்து தப்பி,இராணுவ குழுவில் இணைந்தனர்.
జేమ్స్ మెక్‌కల్లెన్ చేసిన దాడి నుండి బయటపడిన అమెరికన్ సైనికులు డ్యూక్, రిప్‌కార్డ్ లు ఒక ఉన్నత సైనిక బృందంలో చేరతారు.
अमेरिकन सैनिक ड्यूक आणि रिपकॉर्ड, शस्त्र विक्रेता जेम्स मॅककलनच्या हल्ल्यातून बचावतात आणि एका लष्करी संघात सामील होतात.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
द एंग्री बर्ड्स मूवी
programme.desc: Red, Chuck and Bomb have always been the outcasts within a community of flightless birds on an island. But when mysterious green pigs intrude the island, it is up to them to figure out the reason.
रेड, चक और बॉम्ब हमेशा से एक द्वीप पर उड़ने में असमर्थ पक्षियों के समुदाय में अलग-थलग रहे हैं। लेकिन जब रहस्यमयी हरे सूअर वहाँ पहुँचते हैं, तब उन्हें इसका कारण पता करना होता है।

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल
மிஷன்: இம்பாசிபிள்
మిషన్: ఇంపాజిబుల్
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, an elite intelligence agent, is branded a traitor following a disastrous mission in Prague. He recruits a team of operatives to help him retrieve a computer disk that can clear his name.
एक कुशल खुफिया एजेंट ईथन हंट, प्रेग में एक विनाशकारी मिशन के बाद देशद्रोही करार दिया जाता है। बेगुनाही साबित करने हेतु एक कंप्यूटर डिस्क हासिल करने में मदद पाने के लिए वह एक ऑपरेटिव टीम बनाता है।
ஒரு புலனாய்வு முகவரான ஈதன் ஹன்ட், பிராகாவில் ஒரு பேரழிவு தரும் பணியைத் தொடர்ந்து துரோகி என்று முத்திரை குத்தப்படுகிறார்.
అమెరికా స్పెషల్ ఏజెంట్, ఈథన్ హంట్ తన టీమ్‌ని చంపాడనే అభియోగంపై నింద రూపుమాపి, అసలు దొంగను పట్టుకోవడానికి పోరాడతాడు.

programme.title: Modern Times
मॉडर्न टाइम्स
மாடர்ன் டைம்ஸ்
మోడరన్ టైమ్స్
मॉडर्न टाईम्स
programme.desc: A factory production line worker is thrown out on the street for his manic behaviour. He then meets a young, homeless girl, who is recently orphaned, and tries to build a home with her.
अपने व्यवहार के कारण एक फैक्ट्री प्रोडक्शन लाइन से निकाले गए एक वर्कर की मुलाकात, एक अनाथ युवा बेघर लड़की से होती है जिसके साथ वह घर बनाने की कोशिश करता है।
ஒரு தொழிற்சாலை உற்பத்தித் தொழிலாளி அனாதையான ஒரு இளம், வீடற்ற பெண்ணைச் சந்தித்து, அவளுடன் ஒரு வீடு கட்ட முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
ఉద్యోగం నుండి తొలగించబడిన ఒక ఫ్యాక్టరీ కార్మికుడు ఒక నిరాశ్రయురాలైన అమ్మాయితో ఇల్లు కట్టుకోవడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తాడు.

programme.title: Braven
ब्रेवन
பிரேவன்
బ్రేవన్
ब्रॅव्हन
programme.desc: A logger and his father head to their hunting cabin, hoping for a quiet weekend. Instead, they find themselves in a kill-or-be-killed stand for survival when they encounter a gang of drug traffickers.
एक लकड़हारा और उसका पिता एक शांत सप्ताहांत की उम्मीद में अपने शिकार केबिन की ओर जाते हैं। ड्रग तस्करों के एक गिरोह से सामना होने पर वे जीवित रहने के लिए मरने या मारने की स्थिति में फंस जाते हैं।
வேட்டைக்கு செல்லும் மரம் வெட்டுபவரும் தந்தையும் போதைப்பொருள் கடத்தல்கார கும்பலை சந்திக்கும்போது இக்கட்டாக உணர்கிறார்கள்.
చెట్లు నరికే వ్యక్తి జో బ్రావెన్, తన భార్య, తండ్రిని కాపాడుకోవడానికి మాదకద్రవ్యాలు రవాణా చేసేవారితో పోరాడవలసి వస్తుంది.
जो ब्रॅव्हनला त्याची पत्नी व वडिलांच्या रक्षणासाठी एका पर्वतीय भागात ड्रग तस्करांच्या टोळीशी लढावे लागते.

programme.title: Gun
रामा बनबास कहानी सेशा
கன்
గన్
गन
programme.desc: Gemini said Angel and Rich trade firearms after Angel's release from jail. However, chaos erupts when they storm a lounge and slay a munitions merchant.
जेमिनी का कहना है, कि जेल से एंजल की रिहाई के बाद एंजल और रिच, हथियारों का लेन-देन करते हैं। हालाँकि, जब वे एक लाउंज में घुसकर हथियारों के एक व्यापारी को मार देते हैं तब अफरा-तफरी मच जाती है।
விடுவிக்கப்பட்ட ஏஞ்சல், ரிச்சுடன் துப்பாக்கிகளைப் பரிமாறிக்கொண்டு ஒரு ஆயுத வியாபாரியைக் கொன்றதால் குழப்பம் ஏற்பட்டது.
ఏంజెల్ జైలు నుండి విడుదలయ్యాక ఏంజెల్, రిచ్ లు ఆయుధాల వ్యాపారం చేస్తారని జెమిని చెప్పగా, వారు ఆయుధాల వ్యాపారిని చంపుతారు.

programme.title: Final Score
फाइनल स्कोर
ஃபைனல் ஸ்கோர்
ఫైనల్ స్కోర్
फायनल स्कोअर
programme.desc: When two terrorists kidnap former soldier Michael Knox's niece, he employs all of his skills to rescue her and possibly foil a plan of mass destruction as well.
दो आतंकवादी पूर्व सैनिक माइकल की भतीजी का अपहरण करते हैं, तब वह अपने हर तरह के हुनर का उपयोग करके उनकी योजना को विफल करके लड़की को बचाने की कोशिश करता है।
இரு பயங்கரவாதிகள் மைக்கேல் நாக்ஸின் மருமகளை கடத்தும்போது, ​​அவர் அவளை மீட்க தனது அனைத்து திறமைகளையும் பயன்படுத்துகிறார்.
ఒక మాజీ సైనికుడు మైఖేల్, ఇద్దరు తీవ్రవాదులు చేసిన విధ్వంస ప్రణాళికను విఫలం చేసి, వారి నుండి తన మేనకోడలిని కాపాడుకుంటాడు.
2 अतिरेक्यांनी एका माजी सैनिकाच्या पुतणीचे अपहरण केल्यावर तो हुशारीने तिला वाचवून त्यांच्या योजनेत अडथळे आणण्याचे ठरवतो.

programme.title: Backtrace
बैकट्रेस
பேக்ட்ரேஸ்
బ్యాక్‌ట్రేస్
programme.desc: A thief suffers from amnesia after committing a bank heist and is imprisoned. Seven years later, he is injected with a drug that restores his memory so that he may recover the stolen money.
एक चोर बैंक डकैती करने के बाद भूलने की बीमारी से पीड़ित होता है और उसे जेल हो जाती है। सात साल बाद, उसे एक ऐसी दवा दी जाती है जिससे उसकी याददाश्त वापस आ जाती है ताकि वह चोरी की गई रकम वापस पा सके।
வங்கி கொள்ளைக்கு பின் அம்மீஷியாவால் பாதிக்கப்படும் ஒரு திருடன், பணத்தை மீட்க அவனுக்கு ஞாபகம் வர மருந்தை எடுதுகொள்கிறான்.
బ్యాంకు దోపిడీతో తర్వాత గతం మరచి ఏడేళ్లు జైలుపాలైన ఒక దొంగ, తన గతాన్ని గుర్తు చేసుకోవడానికి ప్రత్యేక మందును ఇవ్వబడతాడు.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
शर्लॉक होम्स
ஷெர்லாக் ஹோம்ஸ்
షెర్లాక్ హోమ్స్
शेरलॉक होम्स
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson send Lord Henry Blackwood, a serial killer, to the gallows. However, they are shocked to learn that he is back from the dead and pursue him again.
शर्लक होम्स और डॉ. वॉटसन एक सीरियल किलर लॉर्ड हेनरी ब्लैकवुड को फाँसी पर चढ़ा देते हैं। हालाँकि, उन्हें यह जानकर सदमा लगता है कि वह वापस जिंदा होकर उनका पीछा करता है।
லார்ட் ஹென்றியை தூக்கு மேடைக்கு அனுப்பிய ஷெர்லாக் ஹோம்ஸும் டாக்டர் வாட்சனும் அவன் உயிர்தெழுந்தபோது அவனை பின்தொடர்ந்தனர்.
షెర్లాక్ హోమ్స్ మరియు డాక్టర్ వాట్సన్ మరణం నుండి తిరిగి వచ్చిన లార్డ్ హెన్రీ బ్లాక్‌వుడ్‌ను వెంబడిస్తారు.

programme.title: Now You See Me
नाउ यू सी मी
நௌ யூ சீ மீ
నౌ యూ సీ మీ
नाऊ यू सी मी
programme.desc: Four talented magicians are plucked from obscurity to become the Four Horsemen - a group of stage illusionists who soon attract the attention of the FBI.
सड़कों पर प्रदर्शन करने वाले चार जादूगर एक बीमा कंपनी के मालिक की भारी मात्रा में धनराशि चुरा लेते हैं, जबकि पुलिस अधिकारी उनका पीछा कर रहे होते हैं।
ஒரு காப்பீட்டு அதிபருக்குச் சொந்தமான மிகப்பெரிய தொகையை கொள்ளையடித்த நான்கு தெரு மந்திரவாதிகளை பிடிக்க துரத்தும் போலீஸ்.
ఒక ఫెడరల్ ఏజెంట్, ఇంటర్‌పోల్ డిటెక్టివ్ అవినీతిపరులైన వ్యాపార నాయకులను దోచుకునే ఇంద్రజాలికులను పట్టుకోవాలనుకుంటారు.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
जॉनी इंग्लिश स्ट्राइक्स अगेन
ஜானி இங்க்லீஷ் ஸ்ட்ரைக்ஸ் அகேன்
జానీ ఇంగ్లీష్ స్ట్రైక్స్ ఎగైన్
programme.desc: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.
जब एक हैकर ब्रिटेन के अंडरकवर एजेंटों की पहचान उजागर कर देता है, तो ब्रिटिश एजेंट जॉनी इंग्लिश फिर से एक्शन में आ जाता है और उसे आधुनिक तकनीक की चुनौतियों का सामना करना पड़ता है।
பிரிட்டனிலுள்ள இரகசிய முகவர்களின் அடையாளங்களை வெளிப்படுத்தும் ஹேக்கர் கண்டறிய முயலும் ஜானி, பல சவால்களை கடக்க வேண்டும்.
ప్రభుత్వ సమాచారాన్ని సంగ్రహించి, బ్రిటన్ రహస్య ఏజెంట్ల వివరాలను బయటపెట్టిన హ్యాకర్ ను పట్టుకోవడానికి జానీని నియమిస్తారు.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
जुमानजी: वेलकम टू द जंगल
programme.desc: Four teens are transported into a magical jungle game, becoming adult avatars and must navigate challenges to return home safely.
चार छात्र एक जादुई वीडियो गेम खेलते हैं, जो उन्हें जुमानजी की जंगली दुनिया में खींच लाता है और वहाँ वे अपने अवतार के रूप में फंस जाते हैं। वास्तविक दुनिया में लौटने के लिए, उन्हें खेल खत्म करना होगा।

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
काँग: स्कल आइलैंड
காங்: ஸ்கல் ஐலேண்ட்
కాంగ్: స్కల్ ఐలాండ్
programme.desc: A crew that reaches Skull Island to map it, is attacked by a humongous ape. The survivors then regroup to find out more about the ape, the island's natives and underground monsters.
स्कल आईलैंड का नक्शा बनाने के लिए वहां पहुंचने वाले एक दल पर विशालकाय बंदर ने हमला कर दिया। बचे हुए लोग बंदर, द्वीप के मूल निवासियों और भूमिगत राक्षसों के बारे में अधिक जानने के लिए इकट्ठा होते हैं।
ஸ்கல் தீவுக்கு சென்ற குழுவினர்கள் மனிதகுரங்கால் தாக்கப்பட்டபின் அவர்களில் சிலர் மீண்டுமிணைந்து அப்பகுதியை ஆராய்கின்றனர்.
స్కల్ ద్వీపాన్ని చేరుకున్నవారిపై ఒక పెద్దకోతి దాడిచేస్తుంది,మిగిలినవారు కోతి గురించి,ద్వీపం మూలాల గురించి తెలుసుకుంటారు.

programme.title: Apocalypto
अपोकैलिप्टो
அபோகேலிப்டோ
అపోకలిప్టో
अपोकॅलिप्टो
programme.desc: A mettlesome tribesman must do whatever it takes to protect himself and his family from a multitude of threats during the Mayan civilisation's waning years.
माया सभ्यता के पतन के वर्षों के दौरान एक साहसी आदिवासी खुद को और अपने परिवार को अनेकों खतरों से बचाने के लिए हर संभव प्रयास करता है।
மாயன் நாகரிகத்தின் அழிவின்போது அச்சுறுத்தல்களிலிருந்து தன்னையும் குடும்பத்தையும் பாதுகாக்க முயலும் ஒரு பழங்குடியினர்.
ఒక గిరిజనుడు మయాన్ నాగరికత అంతరించిపోతున్న కాలంలో ఎదురవుతున్న ముప్పుల నుండి తనని, తన కుటుంబాన్ని కాపాడుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
टीनएज म्यूटेंट निंजा टर्टल्स: आउट ऑफ़ द शैडोज़
டீன்ஏஜ் ம்யூட்ன்ட் நிஞ்சா டர்டில்ஸ்: அவுட் ஆஃப் தி ஷாடோஸ்
టీనేజ్ మ్యూటెంట్ నింజా టర్టల్స్: ఔట్ ఆఫ్ ది షాడోస్
टीनेज म्युटंट निन्जा टर्टल: आऊट ऑफ द शॅडोज
programme.desc: The turtles team up with their new member, Casey Jones, to take down Shredder, who joins forces with mad scientist Baxter Stockman, Bebop, Rocksteady and Krang.
टर्टल्स अपने नए सदस्य, केसी जोन्स के साथ मिलकर श्रेडर को हराने के लिए एकजुट होते हैं, जो पागल वैज्ञानिक बैक्सटर स्टॉकमेन, बेबॉप, रॉकस्टेडी और क्रैंग के साथ हाथ मिला लेता है।
ஷ்ரெடரையும் பைத்தியக்கார விஞ்ஞானி பாக்ஸ்டர் ஸ்டாக்மேனையும் வீழ்த்த ஆமைகள் கேசி ஜோன்ஸுடன் இணைந்து செயல்படுகின்றன.
తాబేళ్లు, కేసీ జోన్స్‌ కలిసి స్టాక్‌మాన్, బెబోప్, రాక్‌స్టెడీ, క్రాంగ్‌లతో చేతులు కలిగిన ష్రెడర్‌ను ఎదుర్కొంటాయి.

programme.title: Justice League
जस्टिस लीग
ஜஸ்டிஸ் லீக்
జస్టిస్ లీగ్
जस्टिस लीग
programme.desc: Steppenwolf and his Parademons return after aeons to destroy Earth. However, Batman seeks the help of Wonder Woman to recruit The Flash, Cyborg and Aquaman to fight their new powerful enemy.
स्टेपनवुल्फ़ और पैराडेमन्स कई युगों बाद पृथ्वी को नष्ट करने लौटते हैं। हालाँकि, बैटमैन इस शक्तिशाली दुश्मन से लड़ने के लिए द फ्लैश, साइबॉर्ग और एक्वामैन को एकजुट करने में वंडर वुमन की मदद लेता है।
உலகை அழிக்கும் ஸ்டெப்பேன்உல்ஃபை தடுக்க ஃபிளாஷ்,சைபோர்க் மற்றும் அக்வாமேனை நியமிக்க வண்டர் உமனின் உதவியை நாடும் பேட்மேன்.
బ్యాట్ మ్యాన్ కొత్త శత్రువును ఎదిరించడానికి ఫ్లాష్, సైబోర్గ్, ఆక్వామాన్‌లను తీసుకురమ్మని వండర్ ఉమెన్ సాయం కోరతాడు.

programme.title: Constantine
कॉन्स्टनटाइन
கான்ஸ்டன்டைன்
కాన్స్టెంటీన్
कॉन्स्टंटीन
programme.desc: Detective Angela approaches Constantine, an exorcist, to help her investigate her twin sister's death. As he digs deeper, he realises a dark conspiracy which could threaten the world.
जासूस एंजेला अपनी जुड़वां बहन की मौत की जाँच में मदद के लिए एक भूत-प्रेत भगाने वाले कॉन्स्टनटाइन से संपर्क करती है। जाँच करने पर उसे एक गहरी साज़िश का पता चलता है जो दुनिया के लिए ख़तरा बन सकती है।
இரட்டை சகோதரியின் மரணத்தை விசாரிக்க உதவ கான்ஸ்டன்டைனை அணுகும் ஏஞ்செலா, மனித உலகில் பேய்கள் நுழைய முயல்வதை உணர்கிறாள்.
కవల పిల్లల మరణం గురించి దర్యాప్తు చేయడంలో సహాయం చేయడానికి డిటెక్టివ్ ఏంజెలా భూతవైద్యుడు కాన్స్టెంటీన్‌ను సంప్రదిస్తుంది.

programme.title: Piranha 3DD
पिरान्हा 3डी
பிரானா 3டி‌டி
పిరాన్హా 3డిడి
programme.desc: The bloodthirsty piranhas head towards a local water park. Amidst the fun-seeking horde at the park are friends Maddy, Barry and Kyle who decide to take on the man-eating creatures.
खून के प्यासे पिरान्हा एक स्थानीय वाटर पार्क की ओर बढ़ते हैं। पार्क में मौज-मस्ती की तलाश में जुटी भीड़ के बीच दोस्त मैडी, बैरी और काइल, आदमखोर जीवों से लड़ने का फैसला करते हैं।
ஒரு நீர் பூங்கா நோக்கி செல்லும் தீய பிரன்ஹாக்களை தடுக்க முயலும் அங்கு வேடிக்கை-தேடும் மேடி, பாரி மற்றும் கைல்.
ముగ్గురు స్నేహితులు మ్యాడీ, బారీ, కైల్‌లు స్థానిక వాటర్ పార్క్ వైపు వస్తున్న రక్తపిపాసి పిరాన్హాలను చంపాలనుకుంటారు.

programme.title: Escape Plan 2: Hades
एस्केप प्लैन 2: हेड्स
எஸ்கேப் ப்ளான் 2: ஹேட்ஸ்
ఎస్కేప్ ప్లాన్ 2: హేడిస్
एस्केप प्लॅन 2: हेड्स
programme.desc: Security expert Ray Breslin forms a team of skilled personnel after escaping 'The Tomb'. However, when one of his colleagues goes missing, Breslin is forced to revisit the group that imprisoned him.
सुरक्षा विशेषज्ञ रे ब्रेस्लिन, 'द टॉम्ब' से भागने के बाद कुशल कर्मियों की टीम बनाता है। हालाँकि, उनका एक साथी लापता हो जाता है, तब ब्रेस्लिन को उस समूह से फिर से मिलना पड़ता है जिसने उसे कैद किया था।
பாதுகாப்பு நிபுணர் ரே பிரெஸ்லின்,சக ஊழியர் காணாமல் போனதால், கடந்த காலத்தை மீண்டும் நினைக்க வேண்டிய கட்டாயம் ஏற்படுகிறது.
సమాధి నుండి బయటపడ్డ బ్రెస్లిన్ నిపుణులైన భద్రతా సిబ్బందిని ఏర్పాటు చేసుకుంటాడు. కానీ అందులో ఒకరు కనిపించకుండా పోతారు.

programme.title: Riteish & Genelia Deshmukh; The Love Laugh Live Show
द लव लाफ लिव शो
தி லவ் லாஃப் லைவ் ஷோ
ద లవ్ లాఫ్ లైవ్ షో
द लव्ह लाफ लाईव्ह शो
programme.desc: The famous Bollywood couple Riteish and Genelia Deshmukh share insights into their love life, marriage and parenting with Mandira Bedi.
प्रस्तुतकर्ता प्रमुख हस्तियों को आमंत्रित करते हैं और उनके व्यक्तिगत और व्यावसायिक जीवन के बारे में खुलकर बातचीत करते हैं।
முக்கிய பிரமுகர்கள் அவர்களின் தனிப்பட்ட மற்றும் தொழில் வாழ்க்கையைப் பற்றி தொகுப்பாளருடன் பகிர்ந்து கொள்கிறார்கள்.
వ్యాఖ్యాత ప్రముఖ వ్యక్తులను ఆహ్వానించి, వారి వ్యక్తిగత, వృత్తిపరమైన జీవితాల గురించి నిష్కపటమైన సంభాషణలలో పాల్గొంటారు.

programme.title: Alex Cross
एलेक्स क्रॉस
ஆலெக்ஸ் க்ராஸ்
అలెక్స్ క్రాస్
अ‍ॅलेक्स क्रॉस
programme.desc: While investigating a murder, Alex Cross learns of a ruthless serial killer. However, things soon spiral out of control, leading him on a quest for revenge and uncovering a dark web of conspiracy.
हत्या की जांच के दौरान, एलेक्स क्रॉस को एक सीरियल किलर का पता चलता है। हालाँकि, जल्द ही चीजें अनियंत्रित होने पर वह बदला ले एक साजिश के काले जाल को उजागर करता है।
கொலையை பற்றி விசாரிக்கையில் தொடர் கொலையாளியைபற்றி கண்டறியும் அலெக்ஸ்,தேடலில் சதித்திட்டத்தின் கும்பலை கண்டுபிடிக்கிறார்.
ఒక హత్యను పరిశోధిస్తున్న అలెక్స్ క్రాస్ క్రూరమైన సీరియల్ కిల్లర్ గురించి తెలుసుకున్నప్పుడు పరిస్థితులు అదుపు తప్పుతాయి.

programme.title: Freelancers
फ्रीलांसर्स
ஃப்ரீலான்ஸர்ஸ்
ఫ్రీలాన్సర్స్
फ्रीलान्सर्स
programme.desc: Jonas Maldonado, the son of a deceased police officer, joins the team and works alongside his father's former partner. Soon, he uncovers the truth about his father's death.
मृत पुलिस अधिकारी का बेटा जोनास माल्डोनाडो, टीम में शामिल होता है और पिता के पूर्व सहयोगी के साथ काम करता है। जल्द ही, वह अपने पिता की मृत्यु के बारे में सच्चाई का पता लगाता है।
இறந்த போலீஸ் அதிகாரியின் மகன் ஜோனாஸ், காவல்துறையில் சேர்ந்து, தனது தந்தையின் மரணம் குறித்த உண்மையை வெளிப்படுத்துகிறார்.
చనిపోయిన పోలీసు అధికారి కొడుకు జోనాస్, తన తండ్రి మాజీ భాగస్వామితో కలిసి పనిచేస్తూ, తండ్రి మరణ రహస్యం తెలుసుకుంటాడు.

programme.title: Born to Fight
बॉर्न टू फाइट
பார்ன் டு ஃபைட்
బార్న్ టు ఫైట్
बॉर्न टु फाईट
programme.desc: Dan Barnes, a former professional boxer, takes up the responsibility to coach Matthew Miller, a teenager who is repeatedly bullied by a school boxing champion and his friends.
डैन बार्न्स, एक पूर्व पेशेवर मुक्केबाज, एक किशोर मैथ्यू मिलर को कोचिंग देने की जिम्मेदारी लेता है, जिसे स्कूल के मुक्केबाजी चैंपियन और उसके दोस्तों द्वारा बार-बार धमकाया जाता है।
தன் பள்ளி குத்துச்சண்டை சாம்பியன் மற்றும் நண்பர்களால் கொடுமைப்படுத்தப்படும் ஒரு இளைஞனுக்கு பயிற்சியளிக்கும் டான்.
మాజీ బాక్సర్ బార్న్స్, పాఠశాల బాక్సింగ్ ఛాంపియన్, అతడి మిత్రుల చేతిలో దెబ్బలు తింటున్న మాథ్యూకి శిక్షణ ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటాడు.

programme.title: Modern Times
मॉडर्न टाइम्स
மாடர்ன் டைம்ஸ்
మోడరన్ టైమ్స్
मॉडर्न टाईम्स
programme.desc: A factory production line worker is thrown out on the street for his manic behaviour. He then meets a young, homeless girl, who is recently orphaned, and tries to build a home with her.
अपने व्यवहार के कारण एक फैक्ट्री प्रोडक्शन लाइन से निकाले गए एक वर्कर की मुलाकात, एक अनाथ युवा बेघर लड़की से होती है जिसके साथ वह घर बनाने की कोशिश करता है।
ஒரு தொழிற்சாலை உற்பத்தித் தொழிலாளி அனாதையான ஒரு இளம், வீடற்ற பெண்ணைச் சந்தித்து, அவளுடன் ஒரு வீடு கட்ட முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
ఉద్యోగం నుండి తొలగించబడిన ఒక ఫ్యాక్టరీ కార్మికుడు ఒక నిరాశ్రయురాలైన అమ్మాయితో ఇల్లు కట్టుకోవడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తాడు.

programme.title: Constantine
कॉन्स्टनटाइन
கான்ஸ்டன்டைன்
కాన్స్టెంటీన్
कॉन्स्टंटीन
programme.desc: Detective Angela approaches Constantine, an exorcist, to help her investigate her twin sister's death. As he digs deeper, he realises a dark conspiracy which could threaten the world.
जासूस एंजेला अपनी जुड़वां बहन की मौत की जाँच में मदद के लिए एक भूत-प्रेत भगाने वाले कॉन्स्टनटाइन से संपर्क करती है। जाँच करने पर उसे एक गहरी साज़िश का पता चलता है जो दुनिया के लिए ख़तरा बन सकती है।
இரட்டை சகோதரியின் மரணத்தை விசாரிக்க உதவ கான்ஸ்டன்டைனை அணுகும் ஏஞ்செலா, மனித உலகில் பேய்கள் நுழைய முயல்வதை உணர்கிறாள்.
కవల పిల్లల మరణం గురించి దర్యాప్తు చేయడంలో సహాయం చేయడానికి డిటెక్టివ్ ఏంజెలా భూతవైద్యుడు కాన్స్టెంటీన్‌ను సంప్రదిస్తుంది.

programme.title: Apocalypto
अपोकैलिप्टो
அபோகேலிப்டோ
అపోకలిప్టో
अपोकॅलिप्टो
programme.desc: A mettlesome tribesman must do whatever it takes to protect himself and his family from a multitude of threats during the Mayan civilisation's waning years.
माया सभ्यता के पतन के वर्षों के दौरान एक साहसी आदिवासी खुद को और अपने परिवार को अनेकों खतरों से बचाने के लिए हर संभव प्रयास करता है।
மாயன் நாகரிகத்தின் அழிவின்போது அச்சுறுத்தல்களிலிருந்து தன்னையும் குடும்பத்தையும் பாதுகாக்க முயலும் ஒரு பழங்குடியினர்.
ఒక గిరిజనుడు మయాన్ నాగరికత అంతరించిపోతున్న కాలంలో ఎదురవుతున్న ముప్పుల నుండి తనని, తన కుటుంబాన్ని కాపాడుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Justice League
जस्टिस लीग
ஜஸ்டிஸ் லீக்
జస్టిస్ లీగ్
जस्टिस लीग
programme.desc: Steppenwolf and his Parademons return after aeons to destroy Earth. However, Batman seeks the help of Wonder Woman to recruit The Flash, Cyborg and Aquaman to fight their new powerful enemy.
स्टेपनवुल्फ़ और पैराडेमन्स कई युगों बाद पृथ्वी को नष्ट करने लौटते हैं। हालाँकि, बैटमैन इस शक्तिशाली दुश्मन से लड़ने के लिए द फ्लैश, साइबॉर्ग और एक्वामैन को एकजुट करने में वंडर वुमन की मदद लेता है।
உலகை அழிக்கும் ஸ்டெப்பேன்உல்ஃபை தடுக்க ஃபிளாஷ்,சைபோர்க் மற்றும் அக்வாமேனை நியமிக்க வண்டர் உமனின் உதவியை நாடும் பேட்மேன்.
బ్యాట్ మ్యాన్ కొత్త శత్రువును ఎదిరించడానికి ఫ్లాష్, సైబోర్గ్, ఆక్వామాన్‌లను తీసుకురమ్మని వండర్ ఉమెన్ సాయం కోరతాడు.

programme.title: Maximum Conviction
मॅक्सिमम कन्विक्शन
programme.desc: This is Film - Thriller Category

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
जी.आई. जो: द राइज़ ऑफ कोबरा
ஜி.ஐ. ஜோ: தி ரைஸ் ஆஃப் கோப்ரா
జి.ఐ. జో: ది రైజ్ ఆఫ్ కోబ్రా
जी.आय. जो: द राईज ऑफ कोब्रा
programme.desc: American soldiers Duke and Ripcord survive an attack by arms dealer James McCullen and soon join an elite military team tasked with taking him down for good.
अमेरिकी सैनिक ड्यूक और रिपकॉर्ड हथियार डीलर जेम्स मैककुलन के हमले से बच जाते हैं और जल्द ही उसे हमेशा के लिए खत्म करने के लिए एक विशिष्ट सैन्य दल में शामिल हो जाते हैं।
அமெரிக்க வீரர்கள் டியூக்-ரிப்கார்ட் ஆயுத வியாபாரி ஜேம்ஸ் மெக்கல்லனின் தாக்குதலிலிருந்து தப்பி,இராணுவ குழுவில் இணைந்தனர்.
జేమ్స్ మెక్‌కల్లెన్ చేసిన దాడి నుండి బయటపడిన అమెరికన్ సైనికులు డ్యూక్, రిప్‌కార్డ్ లు ఒక ఉన్నత సైనిక బృందంలో చేరతారు.
अमेरिकन सैनिक ड्यूक आणि रिपकॉर्ड, शस्त्र विक्रेता जेम्स मॅककलनच्या हल्ल्यातून बचावतात आणि एका लष्करी संघात सामील होतात.

programme.title: The Lost City
द लॉस्ट सिटी
தி லாஸ்ட் சிட்டி
ది లాస్ట్ సిటీ
द लॉस्ट सिटी
programme.desc: Loretta Sage, a novelist, faces real-life peril when abducted by a billionaire.
जहां लोरेटा सेज के उपन्यास प्राचीन मकबरों और साहसिक कारनामों से भरे होते हैं। वहीं एक सनकी अरबपति के एक पौराणिक खोए हुए शहर का पता लगाने के लिए उनका अपहरण कर लिया जाता है।
ஒரு புகழ்பெற்ற தொலைந்து போன நகரத்தைக் கண்டுபிடிக்க சாகச நாவலாசிரியர் லோரெட்டா சேஜ் ஒரு கோடீஸ்வரரால் கடத்தப்படுகிறார்.
లోరెట్టా సేజ్ నవలలు పురాతన సమాధులు,సాహసోపేతమైన సాహసాలతో నిండి ఉన్నాయి,కానీ ఆమె నిజ జీవితంలో వాటికి సిద్ధంగా ఉందని కాదు.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
300: राइज़ ऑफ़ एन एम्पायर
300: ரைஸ் ஆஃப் அன் எம்பயர்
300 : రైజ్ ఆఫ్ యాన్ ఎంపైర్
300: राईज ऑफ अ‍ॅन एम्पायर
programme.desc: Xerxes, seeking revenge for his father's death, declares war on Greece. As a result, Themistocles, the Athenian admiral, is compelled to form an alliance with Sparta to protect Athens.
पिता की मौत का बदला लेने के लिए जेरेक्सेस के, ग्रीस पर युद्ध की घोषणा करते ही, एथेंस के एडमिरल थेमिस्टोकल्स, मजबूरन स्पार्टा के साथ गठबंधन बनाते हैं।
செர்க்ஸஸ் கிரீஸ் மீது போர் பிரகடனம் செய்ததன் விளைவாக ஏதென்ஸைப் பாதுகாக்க ஸ்பார்டாவுடன் கைகோர்க்கும் தெமிஸ்டோகிள்ஸ்.
తన సైన్యంతో గ్రీస్‌ను జయించటానికి ప్రయత్నించినప్పుడు, థెమిస్టోకిల్స్ మరియు అతని సైన్యం వారిని వ్యతిరేకించాలి.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
रैम्बो: फर्स्ट ब्लड पार्ट 2
ராம்போ: ஃபர்ஸ்ட் ப்ளட் பார்ட் II
రాంబో: ఫస్ట్ బ్లడ్ పార్ట్ 2
programme.desc: John Rambo is offered the chance to cut short his prison tenure by going on a secret mission for the US government deep into the jungles of Vietnam and locating American POWs.

வியட்நாமின் காடுகளுக்குள் சென்று அமெரிக்க போர்க் கைதிகளைக் கண்டறிந்து தனது சிறை காலத்தை குறைக்கும் வாய்ப்பை பெறும் ஜான்.
